sql_array: CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String, population UInt32, area Float64);
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (1, 'Region A', 100000, 1500.0), (2, 'Region B', 50000, 800.0), (3, 'Region C', 200000, 2500.5);
CREATE TABLE countries (country_id UInt32, country_name String);
INSERT INTO countries VALUES (101, 'Country X'), (102, 'Country Y');
SELECT r.name, regionToCountry(r.id) AS country_id FROM regions AS r WHERE r.population > 70000;
SELECT r.name, regionToCountry(r.id) AS country_id FROM regions AS r WHERE r.area < 2000.0 AND r.id GLOBAL IN (SELECT c.country_id FROM countries AS c WHERE c.country_name LIKE 'Country%');
SELECT r.name, r.id, regionToCountry(r.id) AS country_id FROM regions r JOIN countries c ON c.country_id = regionToCountry(r.id) WHERE r.population IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.name HAVING count(r.id) > 0;
SELECT r.name, regionToCountry(r.id) AS country_id FROM (SELECT id, name FROM regions WHERE area > 1000.0) AS r WHERE r.id GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM regions WHERE population IS NOT NULL);
SELECT r.id, regionToCountry(r.id) AS country_id FROM regions r WHERE regionToCountry(r.id) GLOBAL IN (SELECT regionToCountry(1) FROM regions) OR regionToCountry(r.id) IS NULL;
SELECT r.id, r.name, regionToCountry(number::UInt32(r.id)) AS country_id FROM (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE id >= 1 AND id <= 3) r HAVING regionToCountry(r.id) IS NOT NULL;
